subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The morn is bright, and the garden and rose-bower are resplendent; the censer of Mount Sinai is alight in the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله صبح روشنیست و جلوه گلزار و گلشنی مجمر طور سیناء در ملکوت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement
